title: Base Origin Bugs
description: Quality of life tweaks to the origins of the base Origins mod by Apace! (Does not fix legitimate bugs with the mod)
body:
# Base Origin Bugs ## A datapack making quality of life changes to the base origins of the Origins mod (does not fix legitimate bugs with the mod) ### Requires Origins: https://modrinth.com/mod/origins
### Optionally Requires Pehkui (on versions 20.4 and below): https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui ## Enderian: □ Tall: You are the slightest bit taller. (You are two blocks tall. This requires pehkui and the version that does not have "no_tall" in the name)
□ You have temporary suffocation immunity after throwing a pearl with your ability
□ You take hydrophobia damage if inside a cauldron full of water ## Blazeborn: □ You take hydrophobia damage if inside a cauldron full of water ## Feline: □ Your night vision is now toggle-able with the primary key like Merling's
□ You can now break netherrack, and this has no effect on Shulk's ability to break netherrack with their bare hands ## Merling: □ You slowly gain air if standing in a water cauldron, and gain it faster if your head is submerged in the water ## Phantom □ You will no longer burn on snowy or cloudy days
## Elytrian □ Instead of a max armor value per slot, if the armor you have equipped totals at points greater than 11, your armor will be thrown off (Disabled by default in 1.21.1 due to jank)



If you find any issues or have any questions, please contact me in the Origins discord! I'm also flowersinthedaark there and I'm pretty active! Do note though, it's better to ping me than dm, as my dms are usually off, and are mainly just for friends when they are on.
